label: Image to KG Full
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] End-to-end pipeline for non-JPEG image files (TIFF, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP) with full KG processing: scatters images, converts to JPEG, OCRs them, then extracts, deduplicates, clusters, and describes knowledge graph entities. Handles all file processing automatically. This workflow includes clustering steps that are currently unreliable. Not recommended for production use.
